cases.description: New team preset triggers the skill
cases.prompt: create a preset for our frontend team bundling our rules and skills
expectations: Walks through Identity → Artifacts → Flags → MCP → Scaffold → Output → Validate
Populates the preset directory with selected rules/skills/agents
Runs `codi preset validate <name>` at the end

cases.description: ZIP export of a preset triggers the skill
cases.prompt: package my 'strict-security' preset as a ZIP to share privately
expectations: Activates preset-creator skill (or routes to the ZIP export path)
Mentions recipient install command `codi preset install ./strict-security.zip`

cases.description: Forking a built-in preset triggers the skill
cases.prompt: customize the 'balanced' preset — start from it and add our 3 custom rules
expectations: Copies the built-in artifacts into the new preset directory
Explains there is no inheritance — the fork is self-contained

cases.description: Installing an existing preset does NOT trigger preset-creator
cases.prompt: install the team-preset.zip into my project
expectations: Does NOT scaffold a new preset

cases.description: Contributing an artifact to Codi upstream does NOT trigger preset-creator
cases.prompt: I want to contribute my custom rule back to the Codi repo
expectations: Does NOT bundle into a preset
